creator: reezer@reezer.org
text:
I am experiencing the same problem when starting up vagrant on stable. Kernel is on on r319800.

#0  doadump (textdump=<value optimized out>) at pcpu.h:222
        in pcpu.h
(kgdb) #0  doadump (textdump=<value optimized out>) at pcpu.h:222
#1  0xffffffff80a4a721 in kern_reboot (howto=260)
    at /usr/local/poudriere/jails/11amd64-stable/usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:366
#2  0xffffffff80a4abe0 in vpanic (fmt=<value optimized out>, 
    ap=<value optimized out>)
    at /usr/local/poudriere/jails/11amd64-stable/usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:759
